862 ROUTE_RSDNT_PAPER_CD ROUTE_RSDNT_PAPER_CD A2124D Patient Trans - Paper-based CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that the route(s) of transmission of the current reconciled medication list to the resident/family/caregiver was paper-based (e.g., fax, copies, printouts). 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
